MOTION TO S/A DEFAULT W/DRAWN; 2. DEFT TO VACATE PREMISES BY 4/20/94 @ 8AM; 3. PLTF WAIVE BACK RENTS/DAMAGES & COSTS; 4. FURNITURE LEFT DEEMED ABANDONED; 5. PLTF TO FILE REQUEST TO S/A DEFAULT & DISMISS JUDGMNT UPON DEFT'S VACATING.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HONGISTO, RICHARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRISSEL, SARAH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 61 WOOD ST
